title: Smoked Salmon Pilaf
description: A light and flavorful pilaf dish featuring smoked salmon, perfect for a quick and easy lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf mix and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the pilaf is cooked.
Stir in the smoked salmon, salt, and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
Cook the salmon to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for food safety.
